question: Script actions are triggered by which ServiceNow mechanism?
Which one of the following is the fastest way to create and configure a Record Producer?
options: Create a Catalog Category, open the category, and select Add New Record Producer
Use the Record Producer module then add and configure all variables manually
Open the table in Table records and select the Add to Service Catalog Related Link
Open the table's form, right-click on the form header, and select Create Record Producer
correctAnswer: Open the table in Table records and select the Add to Service Catalog Related Link

question: Which one of the following is the baseline behavior of a table in a privately-scoped application?
options: The table and its data are not accessible using web services
Any Business Rule can read, write, delete, and update from the table
Only artifacts in the table's application can read from the table
All application scopes can read from the table
correctAnswer: All application scopes can read from the table

question: When configuring a module, what does the Override application menu roles configuration option do?
options: Users with the module role but without access to the application menu access the module
Self-Service users can access the module even though they do not have roles
Admin is given access to the module even if Access Controls would ordinarily prevent access
Users with access to the application menu can see the module even if they don't have the module role
correctAnswer: Users with the module role but without access to the application menu access the module

question: Which of the following features are available to Global applications? (Choose two.)
options: Automated Test Framework and Source Control
Automated Test Framework and Delegated Development

question: What is a Module?
options: The functionality within an application menu such as opening a page in the content frame or a separate tab or window
A group of menus providing related information and functionality to end-users
A way of helping users quickly access information by filtering the Application Navigator
A web-based way of providing software to end-users
correctAnswer: The functionality within an application menu such as opening a page in the content frame or a separate tab or window

question: Identify the INCORRECT statement about DELEGATED DEVELOPMENT in ServiceNow.
options: Administrators can grant non-admin users the ability to develop global applications
Administrators can specify which application file types the developer can access
Administrators can grant the developer access to script fields
Administrators can grant the developer access to security records
correctAnswer: Administrators can grant non-admin users the ability to develop global applications

question: The Business Rule script template uses a self-executing function pattern. This type of JavaScript function is known as:

options: Repurpose existing fields, use existing fields, inherit parent logic
correctAnswer: Repurpose existing fields, use existing fields, inherit parent logic

question: Which method call returns true only if the currently logged in user has the catalog_admin role and in no other case?
How must Application Access be configured to prevent all other private application scopes from creating configuration records on an application's data tables?

Set Accessible from to All application scopes and de-select Can create
Set Accessible from to This application scope only and de-select Allow web services
Set the Accessible from field value to This application scope only
correctAnswer: Set the Accessible from field value to This application scope only

question: What are some of the considerations to document as part of the business process?

Business problem, users/stakeholders, available licenses, and database capacity
correctAnswer: Business problem, data input/output, users/stakeholders, and process steps

question: To see what scripts, reports, and other application artifacts will be in a published application:

correctAnswer: Examine the Application Files Related List in the application to be published

question: Which of the following statements does NOT apply when extending an existing table?
options: The parent table's Access Controls are evaluated for the new table
The new table inherits the functionality built into the parent table
The new table inherits all of the fields from the parent table
You must script and configure all required behaviors
correctAnswer: You must script and configure all required behaviors

question: Which of the following are true for reports in ServiceNow? (Choose three.)

Can be a graphical representation of data
All users can generate reports on any table

correctAnswer: Can be a graphical representation of data

Find resources on the web for learning about REST

question: Which platform feature determines the relationship between a field in an import set table to a field in an existing ServiceNow table?

options: table.* will grant access to every field in a record
table.None will grant access to every record on the table
table.field will grant access to a specific field in a record
table.id will grant access to a specific record on the table
correctAnswer: table.id will grant access to a specific record on the table

question: Which source control operation is available from BOTH Studio and the Git Repository?

Actions and Scripts execute at the same time
correctAnswer: A UI Policy's Actions execute before the UI Policy's Scripts

question: When evaluating Access Controls, ServiceNow searches and evaluates:

Only for matches on the current field
From the most specific match to the most generic match
From the most generic match to the most specific match
correctAnswer: From the most specific match to the most generic match

The Weight value defaults to zero

correctAnswer: A Weight value of zero means that no email should be sent

correctAnswer: Can be used in Client Scripts, UI Policies and UI Actions

correctAnswer: Catalog Client Scripts and Catalog UI Policies

question: From the list below, identify one reason an application might NOT be a good fit with ServiceNow.

correctAnswer: Requires as-is use of low-level programming libraries

question: Which one of the following is NOT a UI Action type?
